vpn_tunnel.description: VPN tunnel attached to Cloud Router (HA VPN or Classic VPN). Source: cloud.google.com/network-connectivity/pricing

nat_gateway.description: Cloud NAT gateway hourly charge per VM instance (capped at 32 VMs = $0.044/hr flat). Source: cloud.google.com/nat/pricing

nat_ip.description: Cloud NAT external IP address (static or ephemeral) used by a NAT gateway. Source: cloud.google.com/nat/pricing

nat_data_processing.description: Cloud NAT data processing charge per GiB (inbound + outbound). Same across all regions. Source: cloud.google.com/nat/pricing

cloud_router.description: Cloud Router itself is free of charge. BGP control plane traffic costs are negligible. Source: cloud.google.com/network-connectivity/pricing
